prompt: Which departments have students receiving the most scholarship money?

inputData.question: Which departments have students receiving the most scholarship money?

response.bodyRaw:
{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"Which departments have students receiving the most scholarship money?"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"Which departments have students receiving the most scholarship money?"},"startedAt":1771855617128,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"The question asks which departments have students receiving the most scholarship money. I need to:
1. Join scholarships to students (via student_id)
2. Join students to departments (via department_id)
3. Group by department and sum the scholarship amounts
4. Order by total scholarship amount descending to identify departments with the most scholarship money

The schema confirms:
- scholarships.student_id → students.id
- students.department_id → departments.id
- scholarships.amount contains the monetary values
- departments.name identifies the department

I'll aggregate scholarship amounts by department and order by total descending.","sql":"
SELECT 
  d.name AS department_name,
  d.code AS department_code,
  SUM(s.amount) AS total_scholarship_money,
  COUNT(DISTINCT s.student_id) AS student_count
FROM scholarships s
INNER JOIN students st ON s.student_id = st.id
INNER JOIN departments d ON st.department_id = d.id
GROUP BY d.id, d.name, d.code
ORDER BY total_scholarship_money DESC
","assumptions":["Scholarship amounts are in a single currency and should be summed directly","All scholarships in the table are active/valid awards","The question seeks total scholarship money per department regardless of academic year or semester"]},"endedAt":1771855663482},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"

INNER JOIN departments d ON st.department_id = d.id
GROUP BY d.id, d.name, d.code
ORDER BY total_scholarship_money DESC

visualization.title: Departments by Total Scholarship Money
visualization.description: Ranking of departments by total scholarship funding awarded to students

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT 
  d.name AS department_name,
  d.code AS department_code,
  SUM(s.amount) AS total_scholarship_money,
  COUNT(DISTINCT s.student_id) AS student_count
FROM scholarships s
INNER JOIN students st ON s.student_id = st.id
INNER JOIN departments d ON st.department_id = d.id
GROUP BY d.id, d.name, d.code
ORDER BY total_scholarship_money DESC

visualization.title: Departments by Total Scholarship Money
visualization.description: Ranking of departments by total scholarship funding awarded to students

result.sql:
SELECT 
  d.name AS department_name,
  d.code AS department_code,
  SUM(s.amount) AS total_scholarship_money,
  COUNT(DISTINCT s.student_id) AS student_count
FROM scholarships s
INNER JOIN students st ON s.student_id = st.id
INNER JOIN departments d ON st.department_id = d.id
GROUP BY d.id, d.name, d.code
ORDER BY total_scholarship_money DESC
